text_original: It's fun! The few ads I have dealt with are not the every other click variety That Linky has! At least not that I have noticed. Responses feel thought out depending on the input. If I think of anything else I'll list it.
text_zh: 真有趣！我处理过的几个广告并不是像Linky那样的每隔一次点击就弹出的广告。至少到目前为止我没有注意到这种情况。回应看起来是根据输入内容经过深思熟虑的。如果我想到其他内容，我会列出来。
reply_original: Thank you for your kind feedback! We're glad you enjoy the thoughtful responses and minimal ads. Your support means a lot! If you have any questions or need help, feel free to reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Keep chatting with your favorite characters!
reply_zh: 感谢您的宝贵反馈！我们很高兴您喜欢我们细致的回复和最少的广告。您的支持对我们意义重大！如果您有任何问题或需要帮助，请随时联系support@fantachat.ai。继续与您喜爱的角色畅聊吧！
